sglang.title: [triton] Support head_dim not 2^n in triton extend and decode attention
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In #1159, users found that head_dim = 96 is not supported in native triton kernel.
Modifications

Originally, we enforce head_dim to be 2^n (there is one special case 576, where it is split into 512 and 64, both are still 2^n). This is because we don't handle padding for non 2^n case on

sglang.title: [Feat] Add modalities for vision server when handling pixel values for llava
sglang.author: kcz358
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Previous llava hardcode the number of images, which is 16, to differentiate between video and multi-images, which might cause trouble when handling short videos and is inflexible.
Modifications
Allow to pass in a new modalities parameters when using the server to upload the images. By def

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Streamed tool calls now more strictly follow OpenAI's format; ensures Vercel AI SDK compatibility
vllm.author: K-Mistele
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes tool streaming so that streamed tool call chunks pass the Vercel AI SDK's validations on chunk structure. While the existing chunk structure for tool streaming is OpenAI-compatible for most purposes (including use with the OpenAI SDK), the structure was apparently not 100% correct.
Thi

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add progress reporting to run_batch.py
vllm.author: alugowski
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add a tqdm progress indicator to run_batch.py.
run_batch.py runs requests from a OpenAI Batch protocol-compatible .jsonl file where each line is one request. Batches can have request counts in the hundreds of thousands and can take hours to complete.
Currently there is no way to tell how many reques

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Correct adapter usage for cohere and jamba
vllm.author: vladislavkruglikov
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Pull request #5018 that broke usage of many models with adapters did not add adapter support for cohere models. In this pull request we inherit cohere language model from common adapter interface as well as author of pull request #5018 did for other models

vllm.title: [Misc] GPTQ Activation Ordering
vllm.author: kylesayrs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Activation Ordering

Changes

Update QuantizationArgs to support actorder argument
Add weight_g_idx parameter loader which defaults to all -1s

If weight_g_idx is loaded with valid values, then the parameter is passed to the kernel
If weight_g_idx is not loaded, then no column reordering is performe

vllm.title: [Misc] Fused MoE Marlin support for GPTQ

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
